evals.prompt: Review this code: for each order in a list of 1000 orders, query the database separately to load the order's items.
evals.expected_output: N+1 query pattern identified, batch loading recommended
expectations: N+1 query pattern identified and named
Recommendation: batch load with IN clause or JOIN
Produces perf-report contract with FAIL verdict

evals.prompt: Review this Rust hot path called 10,000 times/second: fn format_order(order: Order) -> String { format!("{:?}", order.clone()) }
evals.expected_output: Unnecessary clone and Debug format in hot path flagged, borrowing recommended
expectations: Debug formatting allocation in hot path flagged
Recommendation: take &Order not Order, consider Display not Debug
